MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Rosalia Rangel is present.
Attorney Jessica Chylik appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alfredo Estrada is present.
Attorney Paul Behrend representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
